name: Jason Boland & The Stragglers
description: '''Jason Boland & The Stragglers''' is an American [[Red Dirt (music)|red dirt]] / [[Texas country]] band featuring [[Harrah, Oklahoma]] native Jason Boland (lead vocalist and guitar), Grant Tracy (bass), Nick Gedra (fiddle and mandolin), Chris Compton (drums and background vocals), and Nicklaus Hamburg (steel and electric guitars).
